decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 7/9 sessions consistent. Session 2 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 6 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 90/3185 lines reworked (2.8%, 21/50). 0/30 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 6.0% (3/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 36. Session 8: 36 (process:20 efficiency:12 ttfw:4). Session 9: 49 (process:20 efficiency:19 ttfw:10). Session 10: 36 (process:20 efficiency:13 ttfw:3). Session 11: 28 (process:20 efficiency:7 ttfw:1). Session 12: 31 (process:20 efficiency:8 ttfw:3).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 243/243 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Only one adapter implements an interface. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
